rules: PARTIALLY SET OR FULLY HARDENED CONCRETE SHALL NOT  BE REPAIRED OR ALTERED IN FORM BY CHIPPING, CUTTING  OR HACKING ETC.
STRIPPING OF FORMWORK SHALL BE AS PER IS 456 CLAUSE 11.3

WHEN DIAMETER OF THE BARS IS 20MM OR HIGHER; MECHANICAL COUPLERS AS PER IS 16172 SHALL BE USED TO EXTEND BARS. COUPLER CRITERIA AND  TEST REPOTS SHALL BE PROVIDED. IF LAPPING OF BARS IS REQUIRED IN EXCEPTIONAL CASE, RELEVANT CLAUSES OF IS 13920 SHALL APPLY.

WHERE SPECIFIED LOCATION OF REINFORCING BARS IS SUCH THAT  IT CAN  NOT BE MAINTAINED EFFECTIVELY USING COVER BLOCKS  OR SPACER BARS, CHAIRS SHALL BE PROVIDED AS APPROPRIATE.
